meta.title: Survey App — Joseth Balcazar
meta.description: A multilingual survey app by Joseth Balcazar, deployed on Cloudflare Pages with D1 storage and protected response dashboard.

survey.rankedInstruction: Drag and drop to reorder from most important (top) to least important (bottom)
